summary: Frontend testing of full-screen AI Chat (AgentChatPage) redesign. All 12 requested features tested and verified.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'Made with Emergent' badge (fixed bottom-right) overlaps the send button and intercepts pointer events, preventing direct click on data-testid='chat-send-btn'. Workaround: Enter key works fine.
AI responses display raw markdown (e.g. **bold**, ## headings) instead of rendered HTML. The whitespace-pre-wrap style shows unrendered markdown syntax.

test_results.test_2_sidebar_agente_first: PASS - 'Agente Contable' is first sidebar item with green pulsing badge
test_results.test_3_no_floating_chat: PASS - No floating chat button found anywhere
test_results.test_5_welcome_message: PASS - Welcome message appears automatically on load
test_results.test_6_quick_prompts: PASS - Quick prompts visible below input when no messages
test_results.test_7_file_attach_btn: PASS - data-testid='file-attach-btn' (Paperclip) visible in input bar
test_results.test_8_send_message: PASS - Message sent via Enter key: '¿Cuánto es ReteFuente de $2M en servicios?'
test_results.test_9_agent_response: PASS - Agent responded with ReteFuente 4% = $80,000 calculation with accounting entries
test_results.test_10_chat_persistence: PASS - Chat messages persist after navigating to Dashboard and back
test_results.test_11_clear_history: PASS - Trash icon button clears chat and shows 'Historial borrado' message
test_results.test_12_drag_drop_overlay: PASS - 'Suelta para adjuntar' overlay text present in DOM when drag event dispatched

action_items: Consider rendering markdown in AI response bubbles (use react-markdown or similar) instead of raw **bold** text
Consider repositioning the 'Made with Emergent' badge so it doesn't overlap the send button
critical_code_review_comments: AI chat responses contain raw markdown syntax (**bold**, ## headings) displayed as plain text - impacts readability
The Emergent badge overlaps send button at 1920x1080 viewport - minor UX issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 features from the redesign are working correctly. Login -> /agente-contable, dark background, full-screen chat, sidebar badge, no floating widget, file attach button, message send/receive, persistence, clear history, drag overlay all verified. Minor issue: send button blocked by Emergent badge but Enter key works. AI responses show raw markdown.
